content.en:
Ye Tian left the Black Wind Mountain and returned to the Terran Race.

This time, he became the Dark King of Black Wind Mountain, and his status in Black Wind Mountain was immediately equal to that of the Wind King, and he even knew a lot of secrets, and even all kinds of precious classics were open to him for free.

For example, those great Taoist inheritances in the Dao art library, he can practice for free.

It's a pity that he is not very interested in the Great Thousand Dao Technique, and it doesn't help his strength much.

At the level of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, Black Wind Mountain's biggest help to him is to rely on the mountain, and his future cultivation will be more on his own.

In addition, Ye Tian could also issue orders to the many Heavenly Kings and True Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain, indirectly letting them do things for themselves.

And many resources will also pass through his hands and be managed by him, so the power is very large.

To a certain extent, the rights of the Black Wind Mountain Half-Step Domain Ancestor and the Invincible Dao Ancestor are not as great as their Ten Kings, because the Invincible Dao Ancestor and the Half-Step Domain Ancestor are not directly in charge, and they, the Ten Kings, are the real rulers of the Black Wind Mountain on the surface.

......

"It's a pity that I can't enter the Forbidden Void Realm to cultivate anymore!"

After Ye Tian became the strongest Dao Ancestor, it was a pity to face this problem.

Although he can let the incarnation enter the Forbidden Void Realm, the incarnation has no way to cultivate, so the Forbidden Void Realm can only let his family enter to cultivate, and by the way, cultivating the Terran and the Nine Extremes Legion is not very valuable to himself.

At this moment, he also understood why Ouyang Jiu'er was not too interested in the Forbidden Void Realm, after all, for individuals, the Forbidden Void Realm was just like that.

It's just that for a force, the value of the Forbidden Void Realm is too great.

When he thought of Ouyang Jiu'er, he found that Ouyang Jiu'er hadn't appeared for a long time.

According to his understanding, Ouyang Jiu'er is not currently in the residence of the Terran, obviously going to other places, but he has not gone to the Dark Forbidden Domain to hunt the Forbidden Zerg.

Of course, Ouyang Jiu'er didn't appear, and he also felt that it was normal.

After all, the major bases established by the Dark Forbidden Domain are controlled by a half-step domain ancestor, and Ouyang Jiu'er may know those half-step domain ancestors, in case his identity is exposed, it is naturally not good.

Therefore, Ouyang Jiu'er must be hiding somewhere to practice now.

With his understanding of Ouyang Jiu'er, now Ouyang Jiu'er is probably already in the ranks of the strongest Dao Ancestors.

Black Wind Mountain Base.

Ye Tian returned here, but this time he appeared as the Dark King.

Of course, he still copied the body to arrive, and the body still appeared as Ye Tian.

Many Heavenly Kings in Black Wind Mountain knew that the previous Dark King had fallen, but now a new Dark King had appeared, and it was speculated that a certain Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor had broken through and become the Dark King, or that a supreme Dao Ancestor hidden behind the Black Wind Mountain had served as the new Dark King.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian will hardly be exposed, but as time passes, the Nine Extremes Heavenly King does not appear for a long time, and everyone else will guess his identity and know that he is the previous Nine Extremes Heavenly King.

Of course, Black Wind Mountain is not very particular about identity secrecy now, so even if it is guessed, it doesn't matter.

After Ye Tian appeared as the Dark King, he entered the Dark Forbidden Domain with the other ten kings of the Black Wind Mountain many times to hunt the Forbidden Zerg, and gradually made a name for himself, and many forces knew that the Black Wind Mountain had sent a powerful top supreme Dao Ancestor - the Dark King!

this day.

Ye Tian is going to carry out a plan, that is, to use the forbidden talent, hidden, and then go to get close to the lord-level forbidden zerg to copy their forbidden talent, this plan is naturally very risky, but if you try to copy the body, it doesn't matter if you are killed.

Once he copied the multi-forbidden talent Dark Spear, it would help him a lot.

Before, he didn't dare to do this because he didn't have a forbidden talent hidden, even if he was forced to go, he would be intercepted by the commander level and a large number of elite-level taboo zergs, and he would not have a chance to contact those lord-level forbidden zergs at all.

But now, he has the forbidden talent hidden, so he can naturally easily approach the lord-level forbidden zerg.

-------------------

In the dark forbidden realm of endless darkness.

Ye Tian's body completely integrated into the forbidden void, shuttling past one forbidden zerg after another, and these forbidden zergs did not find any trace of him.

The effect of the forbidden talent concealment is even better than Ouyang Jiu'er's shadowless divine step, the shadowless divine step can only make people ignore its existence at a distance, but there is no way to ignore its existence at close range, while the forbidden talent concealment can make people not perceive it at close range.

Not very far from the Forbidden Zerg's lair, Ye Tian encountered the First Lord-level Forbidden Zerg, and this Lord-level Forbidden Zerg happened to be one of the ones he had not copied the Forbidden Talent.

It's just a pity that the other party has only one forbidden talent, and that is the forbidden talent: the dark spear, and there is no forbidden talent hidden.

Obviously, the commander-level Forbidden Zerg had two forbidden talents, and it was undoubtedly a very special existence among the Forbidden Zerg.

"Copy!"

Ye Tian finished with a thought.

Abrupt.

The lord-level forbidden zerg's gaze looked at Ye Tian, and he immediately killed it with one blow.

Poof!

Ye Tian's replica body had no power to resist and was killed in seconds.

But this experiment also allowed Ye Tian to test the effect of the forbidden talent hidden, when the distance was far away, the lord-level forbidden zerg could not perceive it, and only when it was a little closer, it could perceive it.

If the copy body is killed, it will take 10,000 years before this ability can be used again.

Therefore, Ye Tian personally accelerated the time by 100,000 times, and in a little more than a month, the ability to copy the body could be used again.

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to send the replica body to find the lord-level forbidden zerg.

In this way, after trying again and again, Ye Tian finally copied the forbidden talents of the nine-headed lord-level forbidden zerg, including nine forbidden talents: dark spear, and two forbidden talents: hidden!

The second forbidden talent: Yin came from another lord-level forbidden zerg, which surprised him very much.

Fusing these forbidden talents, Ye Tian's two forbidden talents were much stronger than before.

When he comprehended the Dark Extreme Dao Spear, Ye Tian obviously felt that his progress in comprehending was much faster than before, and the effect of the Forbidden Talent Concealment was much better than before, but he still couldn't hide it from the Half-Step Domain Ancestor and the Lord-level Forbidden Zerg.

Time passed, in a flash, and several years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian was going to sneak into the Forbidden Zerg lair again, as long as he didn't get close to the lord-level Forbidden Zerg, he wouldn't be discovered by the Forbidden Zerg, so after he entered the Forbidden Zerg lair, he would have more time to investigate the situation there, instead of being killed as quickly as he did last time.
